sample_selection: birthplace code 200 (Mexico) with Hispanic origin flagged as Mexican (hispan == 1 and hispand in {100,102,103,104,105,106,107})
noncitizens (citizen in {3,4,5}) aged 18-45 with valid person weights, sex (1 or 2), and statefip (1-56)
valid immigration timing (yrimmig > 0, yrimmig <= year) and empstat recorded (1,2,3) for computing full-time status
computed age-at-arrival non-negative to identify arrival before 16
